## 📖 Quick References

**Common resources**:
- [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) - Complete development guide & patterns
- [WORKFLOWS.md](../WORKFLOWS.md) - Step-by-step task playbooks
- [README.md](../README.md) - Project overview & setup

**Common questions answered in CLAUDE.md**:
- "How do I debug this?" → See "Common Debugging Tasks"
- "What patterns should I use?" → See "Code Standards" & "Key Files & Patterns"
- "How do I test this?" → See "Testing Strategy"
- "Is this secure?" → See "Security Checklist"
- "How does authentication work?" → See "Authentication Flow"
- "How do I handle Instagram API errors?" → See "Meta API Calls"

**Common workflows in WORKFLOWS.md**:
- Setting up dev environment → "Troubleshoot Development Environment"
- Database changes → "Create & Deploy Database Migration"
- Posts not publishing → "Debug Scheduled Post Failures"
- Before deploying → "Pre-Deployment Security Audit"
- Performance issues → "Optimize Slow API Endpoint"
